revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-080

A light installed permanently, close to the light in regular service, but operating independently from the latter and intended to be brought easily into service in the event of failure of the latter.

It may often be brought into service automatically.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Standby Light}}
